summary: Frontend-only testing completed for Mishant Gandhi portfolio website. All features tested and working correctly at both desktop (1920x1080) and mobile (390x844) viewports.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features verified working: default cursor, dark navy header with green dot + script font name, cream hero section with yellow underline, blue CA/CS buttons, dark navy Send Message button with green dot, LinkedIn stats bar, skills ribbon marquee with orange dots, mobile full-screen navigation overlay, all navigation links scroll correctly.

tests_passed.cursor: Default cursor visible (cursor: auto) - no custom cursor

header.logo: Green dot + 'Mishant Gandhi' in Dancing Script font
header.nav_links: Home, About, Skills, Experience, Let's collaborate - all present and clickable

hero_section.welcome_text: 'Welcome to my profile!' in italic Playfair Display
hero_section.heading: 'Hello, I'm Mishant.' with yellow underline accent
hero_section.company_names: Bold company names (Al Futtaim, Reliance, Essar, Phoenix Group)
hero_section.send_message_button: Dark navy with green dot - scrolls to contact section

skills_ribbon.content: Finance skills with orange dot separators (#D4845A)

mobile_responsive.full_screen_overlay: Opens with all 5 nav links centered
